response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive full-stack and software development experience with a strong focus on web, mobile, and embedded systems, but lacks direct experience in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, or deep-learning workload analysis. His background in performance-critical systems (e.g., low-latency apps in DLang) and open-source contributions suggests adaptability, though alignment with core role requirements is limited.
strengths: Proven expertise in performance-critical systems (e.g., low-latency apps, real-time metadata handling).
Diverse technical background spanning embedded systems, AI-agent infrastructure, and hardware-software co-design (e.g., robotic arms, DLang/Java).
Strong open-source contributions and community engagement (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts, workshops/talks).
concerns: No explicit experience with SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware, or deep-learning workload optimization.
Career primarily focused on full-stack/web development rather than hardware-software co-design for AI infrastructure.
Educational background (Bachelor's in CS + Fine Arts) falls short of preferred PhD/Master's for Principal-level roles.
